no: Kitpack adding unusual kits: thief tricksters, bard (Arcane Chef, Fleshshaper), paladin (Honey-Sipper, Hallowed Reconnoitrer), sorcerer (Magivore-Infected), monk (Rose Blade), ranger (Night Challenger), druid (Decay Overseer), and race-exclusive kits. Supports BGEE, BG2EE, IWDEE, EET. English only.
sum: Adds 13 unusual kits across various classes with distinctive mechanics like arcane tricks for thieves, spell-casting bards, and specialized combat styles.

co.n: Of Paths and Ways: Arcane Trickster (Thief Kit)
co.no: Arcane Trickster thief kit. Blends thievery with arcane magic — can cast mage spells while maintaining thief abilities.

co.n: Of Paths and Ways: Divine Trickster (Thief Kit)
co.no: similar to Artisan's Kitpack's AT, but not truly the same. Avoid installing together if you'll be confused by the same name

co.n: Of Paths and Ways: Wilderness' Trickster (Thief Kit)
co.no: Wilderness Trickster thief kit. Nature-themed rogue with druidic abilities and woodland stealth.

co.n: Of Paths and Ways: Arcane Chef (Bard Kit)
co.no: Arcane Chef bard kit. Eccentric bard who creates magical food items with buff effects.

co.n: Of Paths and Ways: Fleshshaper (Bard Kit)
co.no: Fleshshaper bard kit. Body-horror themed bard with transformation and mutation abilities.

co.n: Of Paths and Ways: Honey-Sipper (Paladin Kit)
co.no: Honey-Sipper paladin kit. Nature-aligned paladin with insect and honey-themed divine abilities.

co.n: Of Paths and Ways: Hallowed Reconnoitrer (Paladin Kit)
co.no: Hallowed Reconnoitrer paladin kit. Scout-paladin combining holy powers with reconnaissance abilities.

co.n: Of Paths and Ways: Magivore-Infected (Sorcerer Kit)
co.no: Magivore-Infected sorcerer kit. Sorcerer parasitized by a magic-eating entity, gaining unique spell-consuming abilities.

co.n: Of Paths and Ways: Rose Blade Monk (Monk Kit)
co.no: Rose Blade monk kit. Elegant martial artist with rose-themed combat techniques.

co.n: Of Paths and Ways: Night Challenger (Ranger Kit)
Of Paths and Ways: Decay Overseer (Druid Kit)
co.no: Druid of decay, death, and rot. Can learn necromantic spells and is effective against undead.

co.n: Of Paths and Ways: Lucky Tusks (Thief Kit - Half-Orc Exclusive)
Of Paths and Ways: 3-Foot-Tall Fury (Fighter Kit - Halfling Exclusive)
